title: Decken’s Power Endangers Everyone
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Shirahoshi, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The core beat is decken’s power endangers everyone.
scene: The scene follows decken’s power endangers everyone, keeping the focus on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Shirahoshi, Fish-Man Island Citizens.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hody took out decken!! What is going on with those two?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And now he's heading this way !

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that you're out of shell tower in the open water, destroying you should be a simple task!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii, run away as fast as you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the speed of a mermaid, fastest creature under the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...mmm, that's not as strong as I'd like...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies. I would have arrived earlier, but there were a few preparations to be made.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in the ocean depths, you inferior being!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You have no chance against me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii, Fish-Man Island, your crewmates ... they're all doomed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't protect a single one of them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're wrong. I'll protect them all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what I've been preparing for, these past two years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're both as crazy big as each other... but only one of them is actually trying to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The kraken is dominating the field completely!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do something about that kraken already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen to me, Oonyuudou!! You seem to be gravely mistaken!! Were you not listening properly to what decken said?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He left this plaza in your hands!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He never had any intention of destroying this island !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is a complete lie, but...

summary: Decken’s Power Endangers Everyone. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
